form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 8 at this track on March 10 over 1900m, 9 len behind Micocoulier with 56kg at $20. Better for that run and can do much better.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 8 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1600m, slow going 9 len behind Andeol with 58kg at $9.10. The race before that 3rd of 10 at Pau All Weather on February 6 over 1600m, 0.7 len behind Majestad carrying 58kg at $10. Fully tested without further improvement.

form.formComment: Returns from a 47-day let-up. Last start 7th of 11 at Pau All Weather on February 23 over 1600m, 4 len behind Kodvedev with 58kg at $57. The race before that second last of 9 at Pau All Weather on January 18 over 2000m, 8 len behind Tulsa King carrying 58kg at $54. Prefer to see him back in form.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when 2nd of 11 at Saint-Cloud on July 9 over 1500m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Ozone with 58kg at $12. Looks sure to return in top order.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut 4th of 9 at Salon-de-Provence on September 13 over 1800m, on a slow track; 0.7 len behind Ladja with 58kg at $6.20. Returned from break came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 9 over 1500m, 4 len behind Senatrice carrying 58kg at $5.30. Further improvement in store.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation tenth of 15 at Chantilly All Weather December 19 over 1600m, 6 len behind Seeway carrying 58kg at $34. On debut ran last of 8 at Le Mans October 29 over 1600m, soft track; 17 len behind El Vegas carrying 56kg at $22. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming raced on speed throughout when 2nd of 13 at Pau All Weather on February 20 over 2000m, 3 len behind Plutarque with 58kg at $68. Second-up 3rd of 8 at La Teste De Buch on March 21 over 1600m, on a slow track; 0.8 len behind Andeol with 58kg at $12. Won't be far away with a repeat of that latest performance.
